song.title: R72 Ain't My God Just Swell
song.lyrics:
[v1] Just today I woke up in the morning and began to pray That all my problems would be kept and swept away Or else the sky would fall And the earth would crumble 'neath my troubles But I can't have it all. He said to me, "My grace is all sufficient and it's all you need But it is your decision just to taste and see The manna sent from heav'n And the living waters bubbling over Best of all they're free [c] Chorus: Ain't my God just swell? He's my Emmanuel. He met me by the well And gave me life that even death can't quell. Day by day He proves Himself in extraordinary ways.
[v2] Just last night I tossed and turned when I just learned that nothing's right. Why can't my situations be more black and white, Not various shades of gray? And if things continue down this venue, My hair will fall away. He said to me, "My plan is perfect, all-inclusive—don't you see That nothing's accidental but it's all decreed, For you to take My life, And to grow in stature, 'till you're raptured To the heavenly."
